title: centaurea × schlosseri
intro: Centaurea × schlosseri, also known as Knapweed or Centaurea, is a perennial plant species that is native to Europe and Asia. This plant contains sesquiterpene lactones, which are responsible for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Centaurea × schlosseri include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and aid in wound healing, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Centaurea × schlosseri can be prepared in various forms, including tea, tincture, and infusions, allowing for a range of uses in herbal remedies.
